reviews.comment:
La mejor para desayunar y comenzar un sabado de trabajo, tiene estacionamiento y por suerte no es muy concurrida ya que la gente va a el ACA del otro lado de la panamericana. Para mi es un punto a favor!

(Translated by Google)
The best place for breakfast to start a Saturday workday. It has parking and luckily it's not too crowded since most people go to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) on the other side of the Pan-American Highway. For me, that's a big plus!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMTdlY2dnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre que voy a capital bajo y cargo, la atención de las playeras es exepcional.
Los playeros de camiones debe ser igual.
En el shop se come bien a un precio razonable

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I go to the lower capital and fill up, the service from the gas station attendants is exceptional. The truck attendants must be the same. The food at the shop is good and reasonably priced.

reviews.comment:
No tiene lugar donde dejar el auto para entrar al serviclub porque evidentemente la gente de la zona deja el auto ahí o los que van al shopping de enfrente. La atencion mas o menos...

(Translated by Google)
There's no parking space to enter the service club because people from the area leave their cars there, or those who go to the shopping center across the street. The service is so-so...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvMTd1Mmt3RRAB
